%7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09scanner.Scan()%0A%09nl_nc := scanner.Text()%0A%09var nl, nc int%0A%09fmt.Sscanf(nl_nc, %22%25d %25d%22, &nl, &nc)%0A%09grid := posi%C3%A7%C3%B5es de in%C3%ADcio e endPos e conserta para _%0A%09var startPos, endPos Pos%0A%09for l := range nl %7B%0A%09%09for c := range nc %7B%0A%09%09%09if grid%5Bl%5D%5Bc%5D == 'I'
